videos.title: [김남국 인터뷰] 추미애 경기지사 확정 속보에 '깜놀' 김남국 ".....네?" | #추미애 #김남국 #경기지사 #경기도 #더불어민주당 #지방선거 #재보궐선거
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 김남국은 청와대에서 열린 여야정 민생 경제 협의회에서 장동혁 대표의 말을 깊이 수용하고, 정책적인 호를 보이며 중국 관광객 예산에서 예산 25억을 삭감한 것으로 뉴스가 보도되었습니다.
2. 김남국은 정치의 본질이 대화이며, 서로 다른 이견을 끝까지 들어보는 것이 중요하다고 생각합니다.
3. 김남국은 정청리 당 대표와의 논쟁에서 최민이 과방위원장이 통과를 시킨 점을 언급했으나, 이번 추경의 목적은 절박한 민생과 경제 위기 극복에 집중해야 하며, 예산은 한정된 자원이므로 그 효과도 집중되어야 합니다.

videos.title: Amid controversy over remarks saying "Park Won-soon and Oh Se-hoon are the same"... Jeong Won-oh ...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Jeong Won-oh, a potential Seoul mayoral candidate for the Democratic Party, stated that he believes that Park Won-soon and Oh Se-hoon are similar, implying they both seek power and cause controversy.
2. His statement was met with criticism by Park Ju-min, a lawmaker who is also running for the same position, who found it shocking.
3. Following controversy, Jeong apologized on his SNS, expressing regret to those offended by his comments and stating that he deeply regretted comparing Park Won-soon and Oh Se-hoon, as he had worked closely with Park Won-soon and felt great sadness for him. He also emphasized that his statement was not meant to evaluate the mayoral position but rather the future of Seoul and its citizens.

videos.title: 코스피 대장주 삼성전자 '날았다!'...시가총액 1천600조 원 임박 [지금이뉴스] / YTN
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics, a key player on the Kospi stock market, recorded impressive first-quarter results, pushing the group's total market capitalization close to 1,600 trillion won. As of 8th March, the combined market cap of Samsung Group's 17 listed companies was approximately 1,586 trillion won. Samsung Electronics holds a significant 40.14% share in the Kospi and Kosdaq markets.
2. The surge in Samsung Electronics' first-quarter results led to a 4.02% increase in the group's total market cap compared to the previous day's closing price. Samsung Electronics' stock price rose by 6.11%, reaching 208,500 won per share at the same time, contributing to a total market cap of around 1,233 trillion won. Samsung Electronics accounts for approximately 77.7% of the group's total market cap.
3. Samsung Electronics announced a significant increase in its first-quarter operating profit by 755% compared to the same period last year, reaching 57 trillion won. The revenue also increased by 68.1%, marking the first time that both revenue and operating profit surpassed 100 trillion won and 50 trillion won respectively. This success is attributed to Samsung's recovery of technological competitiveness in the semiconductor industry, driven by the boom in artificial intelligence, and it is expected to continue this upward trend.
